name: rewrite-ext-unauthorized
_note: NON-mutating 401 path. Header is a well-formed dr_ext_* token that hashes to no row → validate() returns null → UnauthorizedException('Invalid extension token'). validate() does NOT write (no last_used_at update on a miss) so this is safe to replay. Expected body {error:'Invalid extension token', code:'invalid-token', request_id}. The bogus token must keep the dr_ext_ prefix or the guard would fall through to the JWT path and the message would change to 'Unauthorized'. SUCCESS path deliberately NOT fixtured — LLM output is non-deterministic, not byte-comparable.
